items.title_en: Anthropic weighs building its own AI chips: Reuters
items.title_zh: Anthropic正在打造自己的人工智能芯片：路透社
items.desc_en: Anthropic is exploring the possibility of designing its own chips, three sources said, as the company and its rivals respond to a chronic shortage of AI chips.
items.desc_zh: 三位消息人士表示，随着该公司及其竞争对手应对人工智能芯片的长期短缺， Anthropic正在探索设计自己芯片的可能性。

items.title_en: Kevin Warsh Fed chair confirmation plan hits snag as nomination hearing is delayed
items.title_zh: Kevin Warsh美联储主席确认计划因提名听证会推迟而陷入困境
items.desc_en: President Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair already faced a hurdle by Sen. Thom Tillis over a probe of current chair Jerome Powell.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统提名凯文·沃什(Kevin Warsh)担任美联储主席一事，已经面临参议员汤姆·蒂利斯(Thom Tillis)对现任主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔(Jerome Powell)的调查

items.title_en: China factory prices return to growth after 3 years, beating expectations on surging oil prices
items.title_zh: 中国工厂价格在3年后恢复增长，超出油价飙升的预期
items.desc_en: China faces possible inflationary spillovers, though its massive strategic stockpiling onshore and diversified sources of energy provided some cushion.
items.desc_zh: 中国面临着可能的通货膨胀溢出效应，尽管其大规模的陆上战略储备和多样化的能源来源提供了一些缓冲。

items.title_en: Alibaba leads $290 million investment for building a new kind of AI model as LLM limits emerge
items.title_zh: 随着LLM限制的出现，阿里巴巴牵头投资$ 2.9亿用于构建一种新型AI模型
items.desc_en: Startup Shengshu plans to use the money for a "general world model," paving the way for more practical robot applications.
items.desc_zh: 创业公司Shengshu计划将这笔资金用于“通用世界模型” ，为更实用的机器人应用铺平道路。

items.title_en: Oil edges higher as U.S.-Iran ceasefire fails to boost traffic via Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 由于美伊停火未能增加通过霍尔木兹海峡的交通，石油价格上涨
items.desc_en: U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday warned Iran to "stop now" if it was charging tankers to transit the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普（ Donald Trump ）周四警告伊朗，如果它正在为通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮充电，就要“立即停止”。

items.title_en: Asia-Pacific markets open mostly higher as a fragile Iran-U.S. ceasefire keeps investors on edge
items.title_zh: 由于脆弱的伊朗-美国停火使投资者处于边缘，亚太市场的开放程度更高
items.desc_en: The West Texas Intermediate was up 0.62% at $98.48 per barrel as of 7:50 p.m. ET. Brent crude ended the session at $95.92 per barrel.
items.desc_zh: 截至美国东部时间晚上7:50 ，西德克萨斯中质原油上涨0.62% ，至每桶98.48 $。布伦特原油收盘价为每桶95.92 $。

items.title_en: Trump says Iran 'better stop now' if it's charging oil tankers fees to go through Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，如果伊朗收取油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡的费用，伊朗“现在最好停下来”
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump said that Iran "better stop now" if it is charging fees to oil tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，如果伊朗向通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮收费，伊朗“最好现在就停止”。

items.title_en: OpenAI slams Anthropic in memo to shareholders as its leading AI rival gains momentum
items.title_zh: OpenAI在给股东的备忘录中抨击Anthropic ，因为其领先的人工智能竞争对手势头强劲
items.desc_en: OpenAI sent a memo to investors blasting chief rival Anthropic for "operating on a meaningfully smaller curve."
items.desc_zh: OpenAI向投资者发送了一份备忘录，抨击主要竞争对手Anthropic “在一条有意义的较小曲线上运营”。

items.title_en: Melania Trump blasts claims about Jeffrey Epstein and her
items.title_zh: 梅拉尼娅·特朗普抨击有关杰弗里·爱泼斯坦和她的
items.desc_en: The first lady acknowledged writing an email to Jeffrey Epstein's accomplice, Ghislaine Maxwell, in 2002, referencing a New York magazine profile about him.
items.desc_zh: 第一夫人承认在2002年给杰弗里·爱泼斯坦（ Jeffrey Epstein ）的同伙吉斯琳·麦克斯韦（ Ghislaine Maxwell ）写了一封电子邮件，引用了纽约杂志关于他的个人资料。

items.title_en: Iran attacks on crucial Saudi pipeline and production facilities slash kingdom's oil output
items.title_zh: 伊朗对沙特重要管道和生产设施的袭击削减了沙特的石油产量
items.desc_en: The damage to Saudi infrastructure will only compound the disruption to global oil supplies trigged by Iran's attacks on tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 沙特基础设施的破坏只会加剧伊朗袭击霍尔木兹海峡油轮引发的全球石油供应中断。

items.title_en: Keir Starmer: 'I'm fed up' with Trump and Putin affecting UK energy costs
items.title_zh: Keir Starmer ： “我受够了”特朗普和普京影响英国能源成本
items.desc_en: Iran effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz during the war with U.S. and Israel, creating an oil supply crunch and sending global energy prices soaring.
items.desc_zh: 在与美国和以色列的战争期间，伊朗有效地关闭了霍尔木兹海峡，造成了石油供应紧张，并导致全球能源价格飙升。

items.title_en: Salesforce won't be discarded in the AI boom, but what companies want is changing
items.title_zh: Salesforce不会在人工智能热潮中被抛弃，但公司的需求正在发生变化
items.desc_en: Despite the risks, many analysts at major banks remain bullish on Salesforce.
items.desc_zh: 尽管存在风险，但主要银行的许多分析师仍然看好Salesforce。

items.title_en: AI threat's relentless flogging of software stocks shows no end in sight with Anthropic's new agent
items.title_zh: 人工智能威胁对软件库存的无情鞭笞表明， Anthropic的新代理人看不到尽头
items.desc_en: The latest revenue projections and updates from Anthropic revived investor fears of an AI day of reckoning coming for software.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic的最新收入预测和更新重新引发了投资者对人工智能软件清算日的担忧。

items.title_en: OpenAI looks to take on Anthropic with $100 per month ChatGPT Pro subscriptions
items.title_zh: OpenAI希望以每月$ 100的ChatGPT Pro订阅费收购Anthropic
items.desc_en: The new ChatGPT plan expands access to OpenAI's AI-powered coding assistant Codex.
items.desc_zh: 新的ChatGPT计划扩展了对OpenAI的人工智能编码助手Codex的访问。

items.title_en: These stocks reporting next week have a history of earnings beats and share gains
items.title_zh: 这些下周报告的股票有盈利和股价上涨的历史
items.desc_en: Banking heavy-hitters, including Morgan Stanley, are slated to report quarterly results next week.
items.desc_zh: 包括摩根士丹利(Morgan Stanley)在内的银行业重量级人物预计将在下周公布季度业绩。

items.title_en: Andy Jassy makes it clear giving up on Amazon's stock would be an expensive mistake
items.title_zh: Andy Jassy明确表示，放弃亚马逊的股票将是一个代价高昂的错误
items.desc_en: Amazon's stock underperformance is eventually going to change, Jim Cramer argued Thursday.
items.desc_zh: 吉姆·克莱默(Jim Cramer)周四表示，亚马逊的股票表现不佳最终将发生变化。

items.title_en: Meta released a new AI model this week. JPMorgan sees it as a turning point for the stock
items.title_zh: Meta本周发布了一个新的人工智能模型。摩根大通将其视为股票的转折点
items.desc_en: Meta popped after it released its AI model on Wednesday, suggesting the stock has more room to run as investor confidence in its AI push grows, per JPMorgan.
items.desc_zh: 据摩根大通(JPMorgan)称， Meta在周三发布其人工智能模型后突然爆发，这表明随着投资者对其人工智能推动力的信心增强，该股有更多的运行空间。

items.title_en: Caution still prevails even during second-day rally following explosive gains Wednesday
items.title_zh: 即使在周三爆炸性涨幅之后的第二天反弹期间，谨慎仍然普遍存在
items.desc_en: Expect more choppiness ahead, analysts warned, as investors try and discern how the U.S.-Iran ceasefire might play out.
items.desc_zh: 分析师警告称，随着投资者试图辨别美伊停火可能如何发挥作用，预计未来会出现更多波动。

items.title_en: Amazon debuts Masters coverage, becoming the tournament's fourth-ever media partner
items.title_zh: 亚马逊推出大师赛报道，成为锦标赛的第四家媒体合作伙伴
items.desc_en: Amazon will have two hours of exclusive Masters coverage Thursday and Friday in its debut year as a media partner for the prestigious golf tournament.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊将在周四和周五作为着名高尔夫锦标赛的媒体合作伙伴进行两小时的独家大师赛报道。

items.title_en: Inflation held sticky at 3% as U.S. headed into war with Iran, key Fed gauge shows
items.title_zh: 美联储关键指标显示，随着美国与伊朗开战，通货膨胀率保持在3%
items.desc_en: The gauge released Thursday offers the Federal Reserve a snapshot of conditions leading into the Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 周四发布的指标为美联储提供了导致伊朗战争的条件的快照。

items.title_en: Amazon CEO Jassy defends $200 billion AI spend: "We're not going to be conservative"
items.title_zh: 亚马逊首席执行官Jassy为2000亿美元的人工智能支出辩护： “我们不会保守”
items.desc_en: Amazon shares have struggled so far this year as investors question the company's aggressive AI spending plans.
items.desc_zh: 今年到目前为止，由于投资者质疑该公司激进的人工智能支出计划，亚马逊股价一直举步维艰。

items.title_en: Google expands partnership with Intel for AI chips
items.title_zh: 谷歌扩大与英特尔在人工智能芯片方面的合作
items.desc_en: Google has committed to using multiple generations of Intel chips to power its AI data centers, in an expansion of an existing partnership.
items.desc_zh: 谷歌致力于使用多代英特尔芯片为其人工智能数据中心提供动力，以扩大现有的合作伙伴关系。

items.title_en: Iran says U.S. breached ceasefire, Anthropic's court loss, rate cut odds and more in Morning Squawk
items.title_zh: 伊朗称美国在Morning Squawk违反了停火， Anthropic的法庭损失，降息赔率等
items.desc_en: Here are five key things investors need to know to start the trading day.
items.desc_zh: 以下是投资者在开始交易日时需要了解的五个关键事项。

items.title_en: Meta's long-awaited AI model is finally here. But can it make money?
items.title_zh: Meta期待已久的人工智能模型终于来了。但它能赚钱吗？
items.desc_en: After releasing its first major AI model in a year, Meta now has to figure out how to turn it into a business.
items.desc_zh: Meta在一年内发布了第一个主要的人工智能模型后，现在必须弄清楚如何将其转变为业务。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Constellation Brands, Datadog, Occidental Petroleum, CoreWeave and more
items.title_zh: 上市前规模最大的股票： Constellation Brands、Datadog、Occidental Petroleum、CoreWeave等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前市场上涨幅度最大的股票。

items.title_en: OpenAI halts UK stargate project amid regulatory and energy price concerns
items.title_zh: OpenAI因监管和能源价格担忧而停止英国星际之门项目
items.desc_en: The major AI infrastructure was announced in September in partnership was with Nvidia and Nscale.
items.desc_zh: 9月，与英伟达和Nscale合作宣布了主要的人工智能基础设施。

items.title_en: Meta commits to spending additional $21 billion with CoreWeave as AI costs keep rising
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能成本不断上升， Meta承诺在CoreWeave上额外花费210 $
items.desc_en: Meta's additional spending commitments with CoreWeave will be deployed from 2027 to 2032.
items.desc_zh: Meta对CoreWeave的额外支出承诺将从2027年部署到2032年。

items.title_en: From war to weather: A 'super El Niño' event poses fresh risks to global food costs
items.title_zh: 从战争到天气： “超级厄尔尼诺现象”给全球粮食成本带来新的风险
items.desc_en: An unusually powerful El Niño weather event could take shape later this year, exacerbating global food security fears.
items.desc_zh: 一场异常强大的厄尔尼诺现象可能会在今年晚些时候形成，加剧全球粮食安全担忧。

items.title_en: Iran oil shock stirs memories of 1997 Asian Financial Crisis — but here’s why history may not repeat itself
items.title_zh: 伊朗石油危机唤起人们对1997年亚洲金融危机的回忆—但这就是历史可能不会重演的原因
items.desc_en: The Hormuz disruption is hammering Asian economies with surging energy costs and weakening currencies, but a repeat of the crisis three decades ago is unlikely.
items.desc_zh: 霍尔木兹危机正在打击亚洲经济，能源成本飙升，货币贬值，但三十年前的危机不太可能重演。

items.title_en: Anthropic loses appeals court bid to block Pentagon blacklisting temporarily
items.title_zh: Anthropic在上诉法院暂时阻止五角大楼列入黑名单的申请中败诉
items.desc_en: A federal appeals on denied Anthropic's request for a stay in its lawsuit against the Department of Defense.
items.desc_zh: 联邦上诉驳回了Anthropic在针对国防部的诉讼中提出的停留请求。

items.title_en: OpenAI will allocate IPO shares to retail investors as it preps for debut, CFO says
items.title_zh: 首席财务官表示， OpenAI将在准备首次亮相时向散户投资者分配IPO股票
items.desc_en: CRO Denise Dresser said enterprise is now 40% of the company's revenue and is set to equal consumer by the end of 2026.
items.desc_zh: CRO Denise Dresser表示，企业目前占公司收入的40% ，到2026年底将与消费者持平。

items.title_en: Latest investigation of Bitcoin founder ties identity to Blockstream CEO Adam Back
items.title_zh: 对比特币创始人的最新调查将身份与Blockstream首席执行官Adam Back联系起来
items.desc_en: A report by the New York Times claims it has discovered the identity of the pseudonymous creator of Bitcoin known as Satoshi Nakamoto.
items.desc_zh: 《纽约时报》的一篇报道称，它已经发现了比特币的化名创造者中本聪的身份。

items.title_en: Fed officials still foresee rate cut this year, despite war impacts, minutes show
items.title_zh: 会议记录显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年将降息
items.desc_en: Policymakers said they would need to remain "nimble" as they weighed the impact the war had on inflation.
items.desc_zh: 政策制定者表示，在权衡战争对通货膨胀的影响时，他们需要保持“灵活”。

items.title_en: Markets shift back towards potential Fed rate cut this year with Iran ceasefire in place
items.title_zh: 随着伊朗停火，市场转向今年可能的美联储降息
items.desc_en: Odds for a reduction jumped Wednesday morning, hitting about 43%, according to the CME Group.
items.desc_zh: 芝加哥商品交易所集团(CME Group)的数据显示，周三上午降价的几率大幅上升，达到约43%。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Delta Air Lines, Levi Strauss, Exxon Mobil & more
items.title_zh: 上市前规模最大的股票：达美航空、李维斯、埃克森美孚等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: A fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire sparks market relief — but no clear path to lasting peace
items.title_zh: 脆弱的美伊停火引发市场缓解—但没有通往持久和平的明确道路
items.desc_en: The fragile ceasefire agreement is likely to face significant challenges, analysts told CNBC, citing a significant trust deficit on both sides.
items.desc_zh: 分析师告诉CNBC ，脆弱的停火协议可能面临重大挑战，理由是双方都存在严重的信任赤字。

items.title_en: Ray Dalio: Trump-Xi meeting to focus on trade, capital flows
items.title_zh: Ray Dalio ：特朗普-习近平会晤将聚焦贸易、资本流动
items.desc_en: Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio told CNBC he is optimistic about the outcome of a meeting  between the U.S. and Chinese presidents next month.
items.desc_zh: Bridgewater创始人Ray Dalio告诉CNBC ，他对下个月美国和中国总统会晤的结果持乐观态度。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Broadcom, UnitedHealth, Casey's General Stores and more
items.title_zh: 股票在盘前走势最大： Broadcom、UnitedHealth、Casey's General Stores等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in early trading.
items.desc_zh: 这些是早期交易中波幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Upstart Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here’s what they learned
items.title_zh: 新兴华尔街研究公司表示，它已派遣一名分析师前往霍尔木兹海峡。以下是他们学到的知识
items.desc_en: Citrini Research said it dispatched an analyst to Oman's Musandam Peninsula, where he traveled by boat to observe shipping activity firsthand.
items.desc_zh: Citrini Research表示，它派遣一名分析师前往阿曼的穆桑丹半岛，在那里他乘船前往观察航运活动。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Netflix, Soleno Therapeutics, Strategy & more
items.title_zh: 上市前规模最大的股票： Netflix、Soleno Therapeutics、Strategy等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
items.title_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙（ Jamie Dimon ）在年度信函中列举了地缘政治、人工智能和私人市场的风险
items.desc_en: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.
items.desc_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米·戴蒙（ Jamie Dimon ）在给股东的年度信中指出，摩根大通成立250周年，并呼吁对美国的理想做出广泛的承诺。

items.title_en: U.S. payrolls rose by 178,000 in March, more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
items.title_zh: 美国3月就业人数增加17.8万人，高于预期；失业率为4.3%
items.desc_en: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 59,000 in March, with the unemployment rate holding at 4.4%.
items.desc_zh: 预计3月份非农就业人数将增加59,000人，失业率保持在4.4%。

items.title_en: Blue Owl caps private credit funds redemptions at 5% after steep request levels
items.title_zh: Blue Owl在陡峭的请求水平后将私人信贷资金赎回上限定为5%
items.desc_en: Blue Owl attributed the higher-than-usual requests to "heightened market concerns around AI-related disruption to software companies."
items.desc_zh: Blue Owl将高于平常的要求归因于“市场对软件公司人工智能相关中断的担忧加剧”。

items.title_en: The March jobs report will be released on Friday. Here's what to expect
items.title_zh: 3月份的就业报告将于周五发布。接下来会发生什么
items.desc_en: The U.S. economy is projected to show job gains of 59,000 in March, with the unemployment rate holding at 4.4%.
items.desc_zh: 预计3月份美国经济将增加59,000个就业岗位，失业率保持在4.4%。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Exxon Mobil, Carnival, Delta, General Motors and more
items.title_zh: 上市前规模最大的股票：埃克森美孚（ Exxon Mobil ）、嘉年华（ Carnival ）、达美（ Delta ）、通用汽车（ General
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前市场上涨幅度最大的股票。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Eli Lilly, Hasbro, Philip Morris, Intel, Micron & more
items.title_zh: 股市午间波动最大：礼来、孩之宝、菲利普莫里斯、英特尔、美光等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in midday trading.
items.desc_zh: 这些是中午交易中涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Private sector hiring totaled 62,000 in March, better than expected, ADP says
items.title_zh: ADP表示， 3月私营部门招聘总人数为62,000人，好于预期
items.desc_en: Private sector employment growth kept pace, but health care and construction continued to provide nearly all the momentum.
items.desc_zh: 私营部门就业增长保持同步，但医疗保健和建筑业继续提供几乎所有的动力。

items.title_en: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
items.title_zh: Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程
items.desc_en: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.
items.desc_zh: Visa的新工具是主要银行和金融机构将人工智能融入其业务的更大推动力的一部分。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Nike, RH, Sandisk & more
items.title_zh: 股票在盘前走势最大：耐克、RH、桑迪斯克等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.
items.desc_zh: 这些是盘前涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Why $4 a gallon gas prices won’t trigger Fed interest rate hikes — and could lead to cuts
items.title_zh: 为什么每加仑汽油价格4 $不会引发美联储加息—并可能导致降息
items.desc_en: While there's still plenty of uncertainty about where rates are headed, Wall Street commentary shifted back to expectations for cuts.
items.desc_zh: 虽然利率走向仍存在很大的不确定性，但华尔街的评论又回到了降息的预期。

items.title_en: China suppliers warn of higher prices for Americans due to Strait of Hormuz closure
items.title_zh: 中国供应商警告说，由于霍尔木兹海峡关闭，美国人的价格会上涨
items.desc_en: The Iran war has stalled shipments of oil and its products through the Strait of Hormuz, raising concerns among Chinese manufacturers about supply chain disruptions.
items.desc_zh: 伊朗战争阻碍了通过霍尔木兹海峡的石油及其产品的运输，引发了中国制造商对供应链中断的担忧。

items.title_en: New fees, fewer flights: Higher fuel prices pinch consumer budgets beyond the gas pump
items.title_zh: 新的费用，更少的航班：更高的燃油价格使消费者的预算超出了加油站的范围
items.desc_en: As corporate policies change, Americans will feel higher oil prices in their wallets beyond the gas pump.
items.desc_zh: 随着企业政策的变化，美国人将在加油站以外的钱包中感受到更高的油价。

items.title_en: Markets now see the Fed's next move as a potential rate hike as inflation fears mount
items.title_zh: 随着通胀担忧加剧，市场现在将美联储的下一步行动视为潜在的加息
items.desc_en: Traders in the futures market shifted the probability of a rate increase by the end of 2026 to 52% on Friday morning.
items.desc_zh: 周五上午，期货市场的交易员将2026年底加息的可能性提高到52%。

items.title_en: China industrial profits surge 15% to start year, but oil price shock threatens outlook
items.title_zh: 中国工业利润年初飙升15% ，但油价冲击威胁前景
items.desc_en: Soaring energy prices are expected to impact China's economy less than most other countries, due to its massive oil reserves and alternative energy sources.
items.desc_zh: 由于其庞大的石油储量和替代能源，预计能源价格飙升对中国经济的影响将小于其他大多数国家。

items.title_en: Global forecasting group sees U.S. inflation at 4.2% this year, much higher than Fed estimate
items.title_zh: 全球预测组织认为，今年美国通胀率为4.2% ，远高于美联储的估计
items.desc_en: The forecast is a sharp step up from the prior projection of 2.8%. Moreover, it is much higher than the 2.7% Fed officials estimated.
items.desc_zh: 该预测比之前预测的2.8%大幅上升。此外，它远高于美联储官员估计的2.7%。

items.title_en: Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface
items.title_zh: 随着经济显示出表面下的裂缝，华尔街的经济衰退几率攀升
items.desc_en: Economists have pulled up their risk assessments of a contraction amid heightened uncertainty over geopolitical risk and a labor market slump.
items.desc_zh: 由于地缘政治风险的不确定性加剧和劳动力市场暴跌，经济学家提高了对经济萎缩的风险评估。

items.title_en: Don't be fooled by the UK's pre-war inflation print — a 'brutal' surge could be coming
items.title_zh: 不要被英国战前的通胀印记所愚弄— “残酷”的激增可能即将到来
items.desc_en: The U.K. inflation rate stood firm at 3% in February, according to the latest figures from the Office for National Statistics (ONS).
items.desc_zh: 根据国家统计局（ ONS ）的最新数据， 2月份英国通货膨胀率稳定在3%。
